name: libimobiledevice
summary: libimobiledevice is a cross-platform library and set of tools for communicating with iOS devices natively. Includes idevice_id, ideviceinfo, idevicedebug, idevicebackup2, idevicebackup, idevicesyslog. The basis of the iOS runner's read methods.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
